description: Discovery reduces risk before committing to delivery. These discovery tracks test whether a potential solution is valuable, viable, usable, and feasible.

riskFramework.question: Will customers buy the product and/or choose to use it?
Will the solution meet the needs of the business?
Can customers figure out how to use it?
Can we build it within given resources and constraints?

items.title: Composable Core Banking Platform: Chief Digital Banking / Transformation Executive validated discovery
items.name: Composable Core Banking Platform: Chief Digital Banking / Transformation Executive validated discovery
items.summary: Discovery work for Composable Core Banking Platform is reducing uncertainty before delivery investment by testing demand, business fit, usability, and buildability for Chief Digital Banking / Transformation Executive.
items.opportunity: Clarify whether stronger product configuration engine and modular domain architecture create enough customer and business value to justify further delivery across Operations and Product Console, Core Banking APIs.

linkedInitiatives.description: Composable Core Banking Platform initiative focused on improving product configuration engine, modular domain architecture, strengthening customer value for Chief Digital Banking / Transformation Executive, and evolving delivery across Operations and Product Console, Core Banking APIs.

assignments.teamName: Core Banking Foundations - Account Migration Toolkit
assignments.how: Led the discovery framing, synthesis, and recommendation that shaped how Composable Core Banking Platform moved forward for Chief Digital Banking / Transformation Executive.
Supported the discovery with validation on product configuration engine and modular domain architecture, helping close the main delivery risks.
Supported the discovery with validation on product configuration engine and modular domain architecture, helping close the main delivery risks.

assignments.teamName: Risk, Finance & Expansion Platform - Reusable Templates
assignments.how: Supported the discovery with validation on product configuration engine and modular domain architecture, helping close the main delivery risks.

riskFocus.question: Will customers buy the product and/or choose to use it?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Chief Digital Banking / Transformation Executive will choose Composable Core Banking Platform because product configuration engine and modular domain architecture solve a high-friction workflow.
evidenceToCollect: Whether Chief Digital Banking / Transformation Executive describes product configuration engine as a top priority problem.
Whether concept tests show intent to adopt or pay for the improved Composable Core Banking Platform experience.

riskFocus.question: Will the solution meet the needs of the business?
riskFocus.hypothesis: The business can justify investment in Composable Core Banking Platform if product configuration engine and modular domain architecture improve target KPIs without creating unacceptable operating cost.
evidenceToCollect: What commercial, compliance, or operational constraints affect the Composable Core Banking Platform case.
Which KPI movement did make the solution worth funding.

riskFocus.question: Can customers figure out how to use it?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Chief Digital Banking / Transformation Executive can understand and complete the core Composable Core Banking Platform workflow with minimal guidance.
evidenceToCollect: Where users hesitate or need explanation in prototypes covering product configuration engine and modular domain architecture.
Whether the workflow language, navigation, and sequencing are clear enough for first-time use.

riskFocus.question: Can we build it within given resources and constraints?
riskFocus.hypothesis: The teams can deliver the smallest useful version of Composable Core Banking Platform within current technology, staffing, and dependency constraints.
evidenceToCollect: Which architecture, integration, or data constraints sit behind product configuration engine and modular domain architecture.
Whether delivery can be sliced into a realistic first release.

plannedActivities: Interview target users from the Chief Digital Banking / Transformation Executive segment about current workflow pain and willingness to switch.
Prototype and test the end-to-end journey covering product configuration engine and modular domain architecture.
Run a business and delivery review to define the smallest viable slice across Operations and Product Console, Core Banking APIs.
items.decisionToMake: Decide whether to proceed, narrow, or stop further investment in this Composable Core Banking Platform opportunity.

outcome.summary: Discovery confirmed enough signal to proceed into scoped delivery with clearer risk boundaries.
